name: souroldgeezer-architecture
description: Reference-driven ArchiMate® architecture modeling for enterprise, solution, and application architectures. Covers OEF XML build/extract/review/render/lookup, canonical-path drift detection, .NET™ / Bicep™ / workflow lifting, deployment topology, trust boundaries, packaged Java™ layout validation, warning evidence, route repair, global polish, OEF materialization, rendered PNG validation, external validation handoff, layout policy diagnostics, layout provenance output, change classification, per-view readiness matrix, render-contract disclosure, skill self-check, matching Claude Code subagent, and Codex skill metadata.
